name: Healthtech 1
long_description:
Healthtech-1 builds clinical AI that navigates patients to the right place, first time. Today we automate eligibility checks, triage and appointment booking for 1,600+ NHS GP practices.

Tomorrow, every healthcare appointment - GP, pharmacy, dentist, physio - is instantly bookable on bookable.health.

Why now?
The NHS has come a long way, but access to it hasn't. Patient satisfaction is at a 25-year low. Automating access to care - eligibility, triage, booking - is how we reverse the trend.
one_liner: Navigating patients to the right place, first time.
